title: crepis pleurocarpa
intro: Crepis pleurocarpa, also known as rough hawk's beard, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Crepis pleurocarpa include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, and it has been used to treat conditions such as fever, colds, and digestive problems. Crepis pleurocarpa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
